notes.subject: Order accuracy — missing large fry. Call the order back at handoff.
notes.body: Marketforce L3 logged for the 5/13 visit: guest missing a large fry. Sent to Sam Biery, Crystal, Brad, JP Five + corporate. Every shift leader calls the full order back at handoff and bag-checks before the window. This is today's service drill in real life.

notes.subject: Close Labor Reviews 5/11, 5/12, 5/13 + receive PFGC order in NetChef
notes.body: Labor Review overdue for 05/11, 05/12, 05/13 — still not closed. Also VO-Rec BOSS Alpha-Ohio Valley due 05/13 and VO-Inv Performance Foodservice due 05/14 (PFGC order posted yesterday). Log into NetChef this morning and clear all of it.

notes.subject: Customer Service at the Register + Blackberry Shake LTO — hit 0% overdue
notes.body: Both FGU courses due tomorrow. Dixie was at 13% overdue — Brad wants 0%. Pull FGU at huddle, name who hasn't finished, push completion today.

notes.subject: COGS · Shops · Steritech · Labor
notes.body: COGS: portion fries with the scoop, toppings measured, watch waste. Shops: GREET door + register, upsell every order, ticket times under 6 min, order callback at handoff. Steritech: manager walk signed before open, lids on mushrooms/onions, critical checklist owned. Labor: hourly checks, 30-MIN breaks, employee meals rung in at break time.

notes.subject: Only 30 Cents more for Large!
notes.body: Large Soda is now 30 cents more than Regular, not 10. Review with the whole team — the old 'only 10 cents more' phrasing is dead. Standing: Orientation Checklist with all new hires; FGU to 0% overdue by 5/15. Best Burger America 2026 thread — Kevin Goyke (FGE FBM) replied 5/13, corporate excited about the Uber BOGO offer.
